name: l2_powered_nearfield_wake_reference_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredNearfieldWakeReferenceGate combines hover surface-wake cruise skew-wake and OpenFOAM CT/CP/J dimensional rotor-reference handoffs with coefficient lookup shape-guard evidence into a single audit-only nearfield reference export gate.
note: Primary combined gate for matured nearfield wake and rotor-response reference material.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_reference_handoff
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeReferenceHandoff supplies accepted hover ground and ceiling surface-wake reference readiness.
note: Hover surface-wake reference handoff dependency.

name: l2_powered_hover_surface_wake_reference_table
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredHoverSurfaceWakeReferenceTable supplies the compact hover surface-wake reference table row shape.
note: Hover reference table dependency.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_reference_handoff
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeReferenceHandoff supplies accepted forward-flight cruise skew-wake reference readiness.
note: Cruise skew-wake reference handoff dependency.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_reference_table
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeReferenceTable supplies the compact cruise skew-wake reference table row shape.
note: Cruise reference table dependency.

name: ct_cp_j_openfoam_dimensional_reference_handoff
value: PropellerArchiveCtCpJOpenFoamDimensionalReferenceHandoff gates reviewed SI CFD rotor-response reference material after lookup execution solver QA and residual support.
note: OpenFOAM dimensional rotor-response handoff dependency.

name: ct_cp_j_openfoam_dimensional_reference_table
value: PropellerArchiveCtCpJOpenFoamDimensionalReferenceTable supplies the compact six-row OpenFOAM SI rotor-response reference table shape with solver-quality coefficient lookup shape-guard and inherited archive curve-shape diagnostics.
note: OpenFOAM dimensional reference table dependency.

name: ct_cp_j_openfoam_solver_quality_blocker_report
value: PropellerArchiveCtCpJOpenFoamSolverQualityBlockerReport supplies compact OpenFOAM solver-quality blocker count and next-action diagnostics.
note: OpenFOAM solver-quality blocker dependency.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future live powered nearfield wake evidence.
note: Upstream CFD target for live hover and cruise wake validation.
